content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.08%, Bank Nifty -1.05%, VIX +8.85% to 18.33 — breadth weak with PSU Bank -2.09% and Realty -2.60%, but Pharma/Healthcare and FMCG showing relative strength. Defensives outperforming cyclicals; mixed tape favors holding quality and trailing SLs on winners rather than chasing new breakouts late in session (14:45, 44 min to close).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF -1.3%; SL 121 is 2% below CMP 123.52, well-placed. Geopolitical premium and safe-haven demand intact. Hold position; do not tighten SL — ATR gives normal noise room."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Marico +3.3% at 846.95, breaking 52w high. Q4 PAT +18%, MOFSL TP 950. Current SL 838 is just 1.05% below CMP — too tight per Rule (c), risking forced exit on normal noise. Loosen to 832 (1.75% below CMP) which still locks +1.5% gain vs entry 820, and extend target to 875 to ride momentum. R:R remains favorable."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1345.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.6% at 1379, big breakout on Q4 beat (PAT +134%, Encora deal). Current SL 1365 is just 1.0% below CMP — borderline tight per Rule (c). Move SL up to 1345 (2.5% below CMP, locks +6.8% vs entry 1259) and raise target to 1450. Preserves recovery option while locking material gain."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SRF +0.9%, intact. SL 2740 is 2.7% below CMP 2810 — appropriate room. Q3 PAT +59%, Dahej capex catalyst. Hold; insufficient gain to trail yet."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB flat at 9103, near 52w high. SL 8950 is 1.7% below CMP, appropriate. 3.3x volume surge today is constructive. Hold; gain not material enough yet to trail."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.4% at 10604; SL 10440 is 1.55% below CMP, fine. Buyback at Rs 12,000/share record May 29 creates price floor. Auto sector weak today (-1.33%) but BAJAJ tracking only marginally lower. Hold; thesis intact (buyback floor + Q4 beat)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "DABUR -1.7% at 478.65; SL 470 is 1.8% below CMP, appropriate. Q4 PAT +15.75%, FY27 guidance raised to low double-digit. Hold; thesis intact, position above SL with room."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1245.00,
      "new_target": 1340.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.8% at 1272; current SL 1255 is just 1.35% below CMP, borderline tight. Loosen slightly to 1245 (2.1% below CMP) — locks +1.5% vs entry 1226. Raise target to 1340 reflecting new 52w high momentum. Note: Kotak has Sell with TP 800 (risk flag) but CDMO Q4 beat intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM +1.4% at 1265, +9.55% intraday on Q4 beat. SL 1198 is 5.3% below CMP — too wide given +1.4% gain; could tighten but stock at 52w-high breakout deserves room for the catalyst to play out. Hold for now; will reassess tomorrow after intraday extension digests."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER -0.5% at 860.50; SL 850 is 1.2% below CMP — borderline tight but ATH-region positioning warrants slight room. Q4 order book +61% YoY supports thesis. Hold; do not tighten further given proximity to SL would risk Rule-17 anti-pattern."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "APOLLOHOSP flat at 8095 — same-session entry. SL 7950 is 1.8% below CMP, appropriate. HSBC upgrade TP 9000, May 20 Q4 results upcoming (binary, 5 sessions out — not within 3-session window). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA -0.1% at 1873; SL 1830 is 2.3% below CMP, fine. Q4 earnings May 21 (binary, 7 sessions out — outside 3-session window). Organon deal overhang noted but defensive pharma in red tape is constructive. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 5,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Research surfaced BEARISH rating (-0.10 modifier): Q4 PAT -15.1%, ICICI Sec cut TP to 1460 (below CMP 1648), Tata 1mg B2C diagnostics launch threatens 40-50% margin compression per industry research. This is genuinely NEW post-entry information that breaks the diagnostics thesis. Per Rule 13 governance/structural due diligence — exit cleanly at -0.9% rather than carry into a structurally impaired thesis. Small loss now beats compounding downside."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "TORNTPHARM -0.1% at 4538; SL 4360 is 3.9% below CMP, fine. Q4 earnings May 21 (7 sessions, outside 3-session binary window). JB Chemicals merger progressing. Hold; will revisit closer to May 18 to consider event-trim per Rule 11."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at safe 2% distance; no trail needed at -1.3%."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 832.00, "reasoning": "Loosen tight SL to 1.75% below CMP — preserves trade vs forced exit on noise."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1345.00, "reasoning": "Trail SL to 1345 locking +6.8% gain with appropriate 2.5% gap from CMP."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Gain immaterial; SL well-placed."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Flat P&L; SL appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback floor at 12000 supports; SL fine."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at 1.8% appropriate; thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1245.00, "reasoning": "Loosen tight SL to give 2.1% room; still locks gain."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "52w breakout day; give it room before tightening."},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL borderline tight but tightening would invite Rule-17 anti-pattern."},
    {"symbol": "APOLLOHOSP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fresh entry; SL appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "SUNPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive pharma; SL fine."},
    {"symbol": "LALPATHLAB", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Tata 1mg disruption + ICICI TP cut = thesis structurally impaired."},
    {"symbol": "TORNTPHARM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL well-placed; binary outside 3-session window."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TATACONSUM open LIMIT BUY at 1240 (placed 453min ago) is now stale — stock at 1265, won't fill. Should CANCEL but schema doesn't have order-cancel; will let it expire. HFCL MIS LIMIT at 133.50 (placed days ago) is also stale. THERMAX, MCX, KOTAKBANK, ASIANPAINT showed strength but late session (14:45) is wrong time for fresh CNC entries on extended moves; passed. BIOCON volatility too high for entry today. Book is 55% deployed which is below soft target but VIX +8.85% and Nifty -1.08% on broad weakness argues against aggressive admits late session — explicit risk-off rationale per Rule 18.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across Pharma (LAURUSLABS, SUNPHARMA, TORNTPHARM, APOLLOHOSP — Pharma-cluster watch), FMCG (MARICO, DABUR, TATACONSUM), Capital Goods (CGPOWER, POLYCAB), IT (COFORGE), Chemicals (SRF), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO), Gold (GOLDBEES). Pharma/Healthcare cluster now 4 names — at cluster cap, no more pharma admits. Today's -2.40% intraday P&L (-23,393) driven by intraday losses; experiment cumulative -2.52%. Walked admit-side: late-session timing + VIX spike + broad red tape = explicit rationale for no new admits. Two MODIFYs loosen tight SLs (Rule (c) — anti-flush-exit). One EXIT on LALPATHLAB on structural-thesis break. Daily loss limit comfortably intact (49,716 remaining)."
}
